session.user:
Run the following command and report results. Do NOT modify any files.
Run: `cd /home/runner/work/erk/erk && uv run pytest tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_get_plan_phase.py -x -v 2>&1 | tail -30`
Report the output.
session.assistant: I'll execute the pytest command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on test_get_plan_phase.py and show last 30 lines

session.assistant:
**pytest failed: 1 issue found**
**Test Failure:** - `test_get_plan_phase.py::test_cli_returns_impl_phase_for_impl_stage` — AssertionError - Expected: `'phase': 'impl'` - Got: `'phase': 'plan'` - Location: line 131
**Summary:** 11 passed, 1 failed in 0.75s
The test expects the phase to be 'impl' when the implementation stage is set, but the code is returning 'plan' instead.
